sectionHeadings: 029: Claude Code skill kit, a vendored, governed adoption bundle
record.summary: spec-spine ships a copy-ready Claude Code skill kit under kit/: a substrate- agnostic bundle of skills, agents, rules, and config templates that layers a full governed-development loop (init, plan, implement, validate, review, commit, ship) on top of the spec-spine substrate. The bundle is the artifact the "Use with Claude Code" documentation points at: an adopter copies kit/.claude into their repository, customizes the bracketed placeholders, and runs the loop. The skills, agents, and rules were extracted from the Open Agentic Platform and generalized for any spec-spine adopter, then distributed here under Apache-2.0. This spec claims authority over the kit/ subtree so the bundle evolves under the same coupling discipline as the rest of the corpus; it does not change any engine behavior.
record.title: Claude Code skill kit: a vendored, governed adoption bundle
